scripts.dev:client: bun run build:native && APP_ENV=development bun run src/index.ts
scripts.dev:client:clean: bun run clean:data -- --client-dir=./client && bun run dev:client
scripts.dev:server:clean: bun run clean:data -- --server-dir=./server && bun run dev:server
scripts.dev:full: bun run build:native && bun run scripts/dev-full.ts
scripts.dev:full:clean: bun run clean:data && bun run dev:full
